ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review, containing movie impressions */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "movie_title" TEXT /* Title of the movie being reviewed */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity score of the review, representing sentiment intensity */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the review, indicating the review's opinionated nature */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Overall sentiment classification (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "helpfulness" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating given by the user (1-5 stars) */,
  "spoiler_flag" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  "review_length" INTEGER /* Length of the review text in characters */,
  "sentiment_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" TEXT /* Year when the movie was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie (e.g., Drama, Action) */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of production */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Main cast members */,
  "writer" TEXT /* Writer(s) of the movie */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Producer(s) of the movie */,
  "distributor" TEXT /* Distributor of the movie */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie in USD */,
  "box_office" REAL /* Box office revenue in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is verified */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews submitted by the user */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "helpfulness" (
  "helpfulness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each helpfulness vote */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review that received the vote */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who voted */,
  "vote" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the vote was positive (true) or negative (false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("helpfulness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_helpfulness_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_helpfulness_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)
